Intraday post (09/Feb)

Weekly post:

Python course is launched | Weekly post (09-13/Feb)

I’m happy to announce that the Python course is now available on my website for all paid subscribers. See details by clicking on the link.

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

The speed profile is net positive, customers are heavily selling upside vol, and also slightly selling downside vol too. Upside vvol is heavily shorted.

Centroid of the profile is at 6965.40; one should expect intraday RV selling above this line.

Upside pivot is at 6984.07with target of 6991.57The highest chance to break above is before 2PM, because after that the pivot acts as a local border rejecting the spot. In this area, the most likely scneario is that the spot becomes pinned to 6975 locally. In order to pin to the target breaking the pivot, we need high vol with constant call bid.

Downside pivot is at 6920.90with target of 6841.99This is a huge left-tail, but the pivot is very sticky, and spot breaks out of this local magnetic field only at 6896, if vol catches up. So, the pivot is supportive. While the target looks like a reversion opportunity back towards 6880 and pin there.

The thing is that upside vol is so asymmetrically sold, that it creates a strong resistance. What you need to watch is how the spot behaves around 6935/30, handle this band as a line-in-the-sand.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
